lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. It has been well-maintained and shows minor signs of regular wear. All mechanical systems are functioning properly, and there are only minor cosmetic imperfections.
The car is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear consistent with regular use. The interior is clean and well-maintained. All mechanical systems are in good working order.
Fair condition.

Calling all restoration enthusiasts and DIY mechanics! This vehicle is the ultimate project car, offering a fantastic opportunity for someone looking to roll up their sleeves and bring a classic back to life. While it is currently in poor condition and requires significant mechanical and body work, it serves as a great foundation or a valuable source for parts. If you're looking for a rewarding challenge at a budget-friendly price, this is the one for you!

This vehicle is in exceptional, mint condition, essentially indistinguishable from a brand-new model. The exterior paint is flawless, maintaining its original factory luster without a single scratch, dent, or chip. Inside, the cabin is pristine, with the leather seats and trim showing zero signs of wear and still retaining that new-car scent. Mechanically, it is perfect, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage since purchase. It drives smoothly and powerfully, exactly as it did on day one. This is a collector-quality example for a buyer who demands the absolute best.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It requires significant mechanical attention, as the engine runs roughly with a persistent knock and the transmission slips frequently between gears. The exterior shows substantial rust and several large dents, while the interior has sustained heavy wear, including torn seating and a non-functional climate control system. This car is recommended for buyers seeking a major restoration project or a source for parts.

We are pleased to present this superlative automotive specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior profile and a meticulously preserved interior. An investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver who prioritizes mechanical integrity and aesthetic perfection.

Hi everyone! I’m so excited to list my car—it is in absolute mint condition and has been my total pride and joy! Seriously, it looks and feels just like new, with every detail meticulously cared for. It drives like a dream and I've kept it tucked away in the garage, so it's truly spotless. I'd love for you to come see it in person and see for yourself how gorgeous it is. Let's find this beauty a new home!
Offered is a pristine C7 Grand Sport featuring the LT1 6.2L V8 with factory dry-sump lubrication and a 7-speed
2020 Luxury Sedan. Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records available.

Presenting a truly exceptional find: a collector-grade vehicle in absolute mint condition. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections, having been professionally ceramic coated and strictly garage-kept. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather seats are supple with no bolster wear, and the factory-fresh scent persists. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assist features, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. With exceptionally low mileage and a history of meticulous adult ownership—non-smoker and pet-free—this vehicle offers a driving experience indistinguishable from the day it left the showroom floor. This is an investment-quality example intended for the most discerning buyer who refuses to compromise on quality.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical integrity, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Every detail reflects meticulous stewardship, ensuring an unparalleled driving experience and long-term value.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare acquisition opportunity, possessing an immaculate exterior finish and a pristine cabin environment that mirrors its original showroom state. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance and uncompromising reliability. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle stands as a testament to superior care and preservation.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This car is in truly pristine, mint condition—honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been pampered, garage-kept, and drives like a total dream. You won't find another one this clean. Come take a look, you're going to fall in love with it!
This collector-grade E46 M3 showcases the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering with its S54 straight-six, featuring six individual throttle bodies and a 8,000 RPM redline
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. No accidents. Full service records. New tires.

Step into what can only be described as a time capsule. This vehicle is in breathtaking, showroom-ready condition, having been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster without a single swirl mark, stone chip, or blemish to be found. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium leather seats are supple and free of any creasing, while the dash and controls look as though they’ve never been touched. Mechanically, it is flawless, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule with every service documented. It drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line—tight, responsive, and exceptionally smooth. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this is the one.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine cabin environment that reflects a history of meticulous stewardship. Engineered for the discerning driver who demands uncompromised quality and performance, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a pre-owned asset of unparalleled caliber. We invite serious inquiries to experience a level of refinement that distinguishes this offering from all others in its class.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to a standard that can only be described as showroom-perfect. Every aspect of this automobile—from the flawless exterior finish to the untouched interior upholstery—reflects an uncompromising commitment to preservation. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a specimen in truly mint condition. Performance and aesthetics are indistinguishable from the day it departed the factory.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total dream! This car is in truly pristine, showroom condition—it honestly feels like it just rolled off the assembly line. It’s been meticulously cared for and looks absolutely flawless inside and out. You won’t find another one this clean, so come grab this beauty before someone else does!

This E46 M3 is a collector-grade example of the S54-powered legend. Featuring a high-revving 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies, the valvetrain is perfectly shimmed and the VANOS system has been bulletproofed. The chassis remains rigid with reinforced subframe mounts, and the Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox offers crisp, precise throws. Suspension geometry is dialed in on factory-spec dampers for optimal lateral grip and turn-in response. Cosmetically flawless with original paint depth and a pristine interior, this vehicle recently underwent a comprehensive PPI with stellar compression across all cylinders. A mechanical masterpiece for the discerning driver.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Full service history. No mechanical issues.

Experience automotive perfection with this impeccably maintained vehicle, presenting in true showroom condition. The exterior boasts a flawless, deep-luster finish free of swirls, chips, or imperfections, while the interior remains pristine with the scent of fresh leather and zero signs of wear. Every surface, from the engine bay to the undercarriage, has been meticulously detailed and preserved in a climate-controlled garage. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in a state of preservation that defies its tenure, exhibiting flawless aesthetic surfaces and peak mechanical performance. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine asset.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in a state of absolute refinement, reflecting a level of care that borders on the fastidious. Every surface, mechanical component, and aesthetic detail remains in showroom-grade condition, offering an uncompromising experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast. Opportunities to acquire a vehicle of this caliber are exceedingly rare.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty has been pampered since day one and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s in truly pristine condition, inside and out—no scratches, no spills, just pure driving perfection. If you're looking for a ride that feels brand new without the dealership price tag, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won’t be disappointed!

Offered is a turn-key E46 M3 in concourse condition. This specimen features the iconic S54B32 powerplant, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a precision-tuned double-VANOS system. The Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp engagement, paired with a factory-spec limited-slip differential. The chassis is impeccable, with documented subframe reinforcement and fresh bushings throughout. The suspension geometry remains true to OEM specifications, utilizing high-pressure gas dampers for optimal damping frequency. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the exterior retains its factory luster with zero signs of oxidation or panel misalignment. A mechanically flawless example for the discerning collector.
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Full service records. Clean title. Showroom quality.

Presenting an absolute showroom-quality 2017 BMW M3 Competition Package in iconic Yas Marina Blue. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment and presents in breathtaking, flawless condition. The exterior paint is deep and vibrant, free of any rock chips, swirls, or imperfections, thanks to a professional-grade multi-layer ceramic coating. Inside, the Silverstone Extended Merino leather remains supple and pristine, with absolutely no bolster wear or creasing. Every surface, from the carbon fiber trim to the Alcantara accents, feels brand new. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach; it has been serviced exclusively by BMW certified technicians with a comprehensive folder of records included. It has never been tracked, never seen inclement weather, and features a completely clean underside. For the collector or enthusiast seeking a truly 'as-new' driving experience, this is the definitive example. Complete with all original keys, window sticker, and manuals.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the most rigorous standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless aesthetic profile and impeccable mechanical integrity. For the discerning buyer seeking an uncompromising level of quality and performance, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine asset.
